# Labor sheet templates

The same idea as customer quote templates but for labor sheets. This is what your fixers or installers will see and lets you create templates with specific layouts and info in the header and footer.

You can edit and fine-tune the actual labor sheet in the [labor sheet editor](/docs/labor-and-installers/labor-sheet-editor) per quote.

## Where to find it

**Templates > Labor sheet templates**.

## Related

- [Labor sheet editor](/docs/labor-and-installers/labor-sheet-editor)
- [Customer quote templates](/docs/templates/customer-quote-templates)
